pilot_signal_strength.evidence: UAD F1=0.704 exceeds 0.6 threshold; DFDA 11.14% improvement exceeds 10%; perfect recall

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H1 supported (F1=0.704 > 0.6); H3 supported (11.14% > 10%); gates passed

path_to_full_result.evidence: Clear pipeline: cross-model validation, multi-seed, DFDA scaling, end-to-end

novelty.evidence: First unsupervised absorption detection; first training-free compensation; no prior work

resource_efficiency.evidence: Pilot in 27.8s; full validation ~80 min; DFDA uses 388 params per pair

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: No direct pilot; clustering works on first-letter but semantic hierarchies untested

path_to_full_result.evidence: No clear pipeline; would require significant new WordNet experiments

novelty.evidence: Extends Geometry of Concepts but less distinctive than UAD

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: No pilot evidence; seed stability untested

hypothesis_survival.evidence: All hypotheses untested; high falsification risk

path_to_full_result.evidence: Requires 3-5 SAE training runs; high risk of negative result

novelty.evidence: High novelty if supported (challenges field's framing)

hypothesis_survival.evidence: All correlations untested; dead feature ratios were 94-99%

path_to_full_result.evidence: Requires multiple SAE configs; confounding risks high

reasons: UAD F1=0.704 exceeds 0.6 threshold by 17% margin
UAD recall=1.0 (perfect) -- no false negatives on absorbed pairs
DFDA uses only 388 parameters total (<0.01% of SAE params)
Novelty is genuine: no prior work addresses unsupervised absorption detection or training-free compensation
Clear validation pipeline defined: cross-model (Gemma-2B, Pythia-2.8B), multi-seed (3 seeds), DFDA scaling, end-to-end
Pilot runtime 27.8s confirms resource efficiency; full validation estimated ~80 min
H1 and H3 falsification criteria were NOT triggered; main hypotheses survive
next_actions: Run UAD on Gemma-2B layer 10 SAE (16K features, 10K tokens)
Run UAD on GPT-2 Small with 3 seeds (42, 123, 456)
Implement Chanin et al. true absorption protocol for ground-truth labels
Fix pre-trained SAE loading compatibility with SAELens v6.39.0
Scale DFDA to >= 8 absorbed pairs on 2 models
Measure probe accuracy improvement post-compensation (end-to-end pipeline)
Run ablation: UAD without clustering; DFDA without residual

G2.action_if_failed: If F1 >= 0.5 but < 0.55: proceed with caveat; if < 0.5: PIVOT

G3.action_if_failed: Downgrade DFDA to pilot result; paper focuses on UAD only

G4.action_if_failed: Report UAD+DFDA as separate contributions without end-to-end claim

pivot_trigger: If UAD F1 < 0.5 on any of Gemma-2B or Pythia-2.8B, pivot to backup candidate based on observed failure mode
